prompt: How many distinct ways are there to choose 15 items from a set of 50 distinct items (the binomial coefficient C(50,15))? Do not compute it exactly; give a calibrated estimate as three labeled values on one line, exactly: P5: <number>; P50: <number>; P95: <number> (P5/P95 bound your 90% interval, P50 median). You may use scientific notation, e.g. 3.2e12.
